examples.title: Induction Step Verification
examples.description: Validates inductive step for sum 1+2+...+n = n(n+1)/2
examples.code:
FUNCTION verify_inductive_step(n):
    ASSUME sum_up_to(n) = n(n+1)/2
    sum_up_to(n+1) = sum_up_to(n) + (n+1)
    EXPECT sum_up_to(n+1) = (n+1)(n+2)/2
    RETURN verification_status
examples.explanation: Shows computational verification of inductive step
